headline: iResearch Services Announces Winners of the TLFT Awards 2026
summary: iResearch Services is proud to announce the winners of the TLFT 2026 Awards, a global program that honors excellence in thought leadership across industries. The winners, revealed today, will be celebrated at the Thought Leadership for Tomorrow executive working forum on June 4, 2026, at the Harvard Club of New York City.

headline: Top Dividend Stocks To Consider In May 2026
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it has seen an impressive 27% increase over the past year with earnings projected to grow by 17% per annum in the coming years. In this context of robust growth expectations, dividend stocks that offer stability and consistent income can be attractive options for investors seeking to capitalize on these favorable conditions.

headline: Post Office names Fujitsu’s replacements to run scandal-hit Horizon system
summary: Accenture and One View Commerce (OVC) have been awarded contracts and will operate the system that will eventually be replaced.

headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Says AI Is Doing 'Most Of The Heavy Lifting' In Compliance As Resolution Times Improve By 90%
summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says AI is streamlining compliance work, cutting account restriction resolution times by 90%.

headline: Is It Time To Reevaluate Accenture (ACN) After Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: If you are wondering whether Accenture's current share price offers value or just more volatility, starting with a clear view of where the stock sits today can help you frame the opportunity and the risks. Accenture last closed at US$179.22, with the stock up 12.3% over the past week but down 8.1% over the past month, 31.1% year to date and 42.1% over the last year. Those moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in large IT services providers, where investors are weighing long term...
